reviews.author: chirag gahlaut
reviews.text: Is this the best beach ive been to? Yes absolutely. Serene and calm. The beach was comparatively empty and not many tourists come here. The sand was white and water blue. Its a 2 hours drive from nha trang and you can spend the whole day here. You can rent a bed and relax here all day.

reviews.author: Canh Le
reviews.text: It is said that this is the most beautiful beach in Viet Nam, correct. The blue ocean, white sand and sunny all day but recently more and more Chinese tourists come here and make this beach noisier. There is not much resort located in here so it maintains the wild beach by itself

reviews.author: Palm Trees
reviews.text: I was there on October 2025 and wanted to come back again. The place is nice. Oct is light on pricing and privacy. But a lot of mosquitoes around.

reviews.author: trung hieu
reviews.text: The beach in the resort is so beautiful, clean, blue, âmll wave with many water sports. There are many Chinese tourists visit here in the daytime.

reviews.author: Andy Nguyen
reviews.text: Doc Let Beach, located approximately 49 kilometers north of Nha Trang in Khanh Hoa province, is a picturesque destination renowned for its pristine white sands and tranquil azure waters. The beach’s gentle slope and calm waves make it particularly suitable for families with children. ￼ Visitors often highlight the beach’s serene atmosphere, which offers a peaceful retreat from the busier Nha Trang city center. The surrounding area provides a glimpse into local life, featuring street food vendors, morning markets, and massage shops, all at more affordable prices compared to other regions. ￼ For those traveling from Nha Trang, reaching Doc Let Beach is convenient. Bus #3 operates regularly, transporting passengers directly to the beach in about an hour and a half. Upon arrival, amenities such as rentable beach chairs are available, and local vendors offer a variety of snacks, including the delightful tofu pudding with ginger caramel. ￼ In summary, Doc Let Beach stands out as a must-visit destination for those seeking a blend of natural beauty and cultural immersion. Its combination of stunning scenery, clear and safe waters, and authentic local experiences make it a highlight of the Nha Trang region.

reviews.author: Tung Hoang
reviews.text: Dốc Lết Beach is a wonderful site 50km away from Nha Trang city. It's covered with white sand and the waves are nice. November is a low season and you have almost all the beach for yourself. Going there from Nha Trang by local bus costs you only 60.000₫ the return ticket and the bus passes by Tran Phu street, which goes alongside the beach.

reviews.author: Ryan Do
reviews.text: Such a beautiful day spending here!! 👍👍👍

reviews.author: Hanh M. Nguyen
reviews.text: This once beautiful beach is now filled with trashes everywhere... The sand no longer pristine white, though the water is still very blue, and clear.

reviews.author: Simon Hodson
reviews.text: Best beach in Vietnam, clean, shallow water and the water is lovely and warm. Really love this beach. Make sure you come and visit this beach.

reviews.author: van anh Nguyen
reviews.text: Very beautiful beach, clear water, white sand and sweet coconut But not much pro service here

reviews.author: Nguyet Nguyen
reviews.text: Very nice and clean beach, 50km far from Nha Trang city but I really enjoy here.

reviews.author: Aus Cory Keeper
reviews.text: Beautiful beach about an hour north of the hustle and bustle of Nha Trang. The sand is fine and firm great for walking or going for a run. The water is shallow and great for families. There are jet skis and paragliding available for those looking for an adrenaline rush. To the north of the beach there are a few beach shack left (there were more 10 years ago) where you can rent a seat/table and buy a drink. The remnants of “seafood wet market” is close by and you can get the ladies to cook up lunch too. Very relaxing spot. Do not miss it if you are in Ninh Hoa.

reviews.author: Matthew Smith
reviews.text: Heartbreaking. This should be among the most beautiful beaches in Viet Nam, sadly its entire length is covered in plastic and polystyrene tourist rubbish. It's truly disgusting and such a sad disappointment. The ear-bleed volume karaoke doesn't help either.

reviews.author: Raphael Taku-Tuti
reviews.text: Very beautiful! Thanks God it's not that crowded...

reviews.author: Huy Do Duc
reviews.text: Seafood is very cheap. Beach is clean and plain, good for kids to swim and play.

reviews.author: Walk Europe
reviews.text: Beautiful beach, visit it during your trip.

reviews.author: Vieren Chen
reviews.text: Too many china tourist...not so clean... there is entrance fee.. not many food choices..

reviews.author: Minh Nguyen
reviews.text: Been here, I had an other review but don’t mind if I do an other , beautiful beach , fresh sea food since I am the local the price is good for me but if you are a foreigner or come from other place the price would be double or more... I love the scenes in here, the tree , sand, locals, I would want to watch the star in the night, could add in my bucket lists.

reviews.author: Quang Nguyen
reviews.text: Very nice beach. Expensive food.

reviews.author: Tina M
reviews.text: The scenery is amazing! I think the beach here is the most beautiful beach in Vietnam. The sand is as fine as mud, and the wind and waves are gentle. There are many beautiful shells and hermit crabs on the beach. There are not many people. There are also paid marine activities to choose from, and you can enjoy a wonderful s vacation.

reviews.author: Laurence Good
reviews.text: If it’s raining, it will seriously depress you. When the sun came out we had a good time, but there is a lot of rubbish.

reviews.author: Huy Nguyen
reviews.text: Beautiful beach, white sand and clean water. Unfortunately the beach was surrounded by many restaurants ruin the view and over all experiences. Too much trash and waste water dump right on the beach.

reviews.author: Good Hitech
reviews.text: Landscape was good but many chinese here

reviews.author: Nguyễn Hiếu
reviews.text: Highly recommend. Clean beach. Cheap food. Spent hours to swim here

reviews.author: Tuấn Anh Nguyễn
reviews.text: Best beach, nice view. Not many tourists here

reviews.author: mark evison
reviews.text: Locals free, foreigners pay 100k to a fat-faced woman on the gate. Chinese style. No thanks

reviews.author: Ilya Devin
reviews.text: dirty beach.... many Chinese people, but wonderfull water pool

reviews.author: Nguyen Le Trong
reviews.text: Garbage quite much. Beautiful beach.
